attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ASN_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.MESSAGE_3B2_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ORDER_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PO_RELEASE_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.REFERENCE_ASN_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.WO_TRANSACTED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.LPN_PACKED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.DF_FEE_PROCESS_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PO_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.RETRO_EXCEPTION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.SHIP_VIA, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.INVENTORY_ITEM_MPN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.INV_ATT_BU, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.INV_ATT_PF, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.EDCS_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.RESERVATION_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.SHUB_COO, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.LPN_CREATED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.PACKAGING_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.LOCATOR_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.INV_ATT_PO, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.FTZ_VALUE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.CM_SITE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.SUPPLIER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.MANUFACTURER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.SUBINVENTORY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.VALIDATION_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.BATCH_ID 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE,
(
 select ASN_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE
 minus
 select ASN_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_ASNLINES_IB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ASN_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.ASN_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNLNS_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_ASNLINES_IB_IFACE)
